name: stage-it
description: Stage.it generates Shopify product photography from live catalog images, preview candidates, and upload approved media.

interface.shortDescription: Create AI product photos from real Shopify catalog images.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to a Shopify store, pull product catalog media, generate product-photo previews from the real source images, and upload approved generated images back to Shopify as additional product media.
defaultPrompt: Generate Shopify product photo previews from my store.
Pull my Shopify catalog images and make a preview set.
Upload approved product photos back to Shopify.
